title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tampa with a Z-Score of +3.97. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is moderate at 12.1 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating during this period.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave measures immediately
